extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT attacked with full Jumbo-Visma leadout 10km out, solo'd to win by 16 seconds over disorganized chase groups.
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma deployed full team attack 10km from finish, isolating GC riders despite no decisive climb present.
Quick-Step let early break reach 7min before reacting, revealing poor threat assessment on undulating terrain.
Chase groups fragmented into 1-4 riders, showing no cross-team cooperation even with 4km remaining to catch.
Van Aert extended GC lead by 16sec on non-mountain stage, exploiting disorganized sprinter teams on technical finish.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: winning from 10km solo break while in yellow reveals exceptional form beyond typical sprint finishes
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: only GC rider following Jumbo's acceleration suggests strong positioning but ultimately lost 16 seconds
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: present near front during team attack but didn't contribute, possibly following team orders to protect Van Aert
rider_signals.PHILLIPS Jasper: negative: won chase sprint but thought he won stage, revealing spatial awareness failure and poor race radio communication
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: positive: finished third at 35 years old behind team leader, showing Jumbo depth on technical finishes
